mapper.sql: id, name, subtitle, cover, category, tags, intro, status, recommend_flag, song_count, play_count, favorite_count, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from playlist where id = #{id} limit 1

select from playlist where id in
#{id}
select from playlist where status = 'enabled' order by recommend_flag desc, favorite_count desc, play_count desc, update_time desc, id desc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update playlist set name = #{name}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, cover = #{cover}, category = #{category}, tags = #{tags}, intro = #{intro}, status = #{status}, recommend_flag = #{recommendFlag}, song_count = #{songCount}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into playlist_song(playlist_id, song_id, sort_num) values
(#{playlistId}, #{songId}, #{index} + 1)
mapper.select: select song_id from playlist_song where playlist_id = #{playlistId} order by sort_num asc, id asc
